/opt/rh/devtoolset-7/root/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -fopenmp -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -shared -Wl,-soname,libmtpr_bind.so -o ../../lib/descriptor/mtpr/libmtpr_bind.so CMakeFiles/mtpr_bind.dir/bind/mtpr_bind.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,/data/home/liuhanyu/hyliu/code/rubbish/test/AI2Pot/source/build/lib/descriptor/mtpr:/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib:/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib ../../lib/descriptor/mtpr/libmtpParamOp.so ../../lib/descriptor/mtpr/libmtpBasisOp.so /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/libpython3.9.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so -lpthread -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/data/home/liuhanyu/anaconda3/envs/mlff_1/lib/python3.9/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-rpath-link,/data/home/liuhanyu/hyliu/code/rubbish/test/AI2Pot/source/build/lib/descriptor/mtpr
